{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54257", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-120", "name": "Buffer Copy without Checking Size of Input ('Classic Buffer Overflow')"}], "description": "### Impact
Most apps will crash and some may perform incorrect buffer allocations in the Node.js `Buffer` API resulting in unexpected truncation or allocation.

### Workarounds
No workarounds. Do not use these impacted Electron releases

### Fixed Versions
* `42.3.3`

### For more information
If you have any questions or comments about this advisory, email us at [security@electronjs.org](mailto:security@electronjs.org)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00253, "percentile": 0.16567}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q6m5-f73j-m9mc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-15T20:20:24Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q6m5-f73j-m9mc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q6m5-f73j-m9mc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54257"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-15T20:20:24Z", "references": ["https://github.com/electron/electron/security/advisories/GHSA-q6m5-f73j-m9mc", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q6m5-f73j-m9mc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/electron/electron/security-advisories/GHSA-q6m5-f73j-m9mc", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/electron/electron", "summary": "Electron: Buffer performs incorrect byte length calculations resulting in heap buffer under/overflow", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-15T20:20:25Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q6m5-f73j-m9mc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "42.3.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "electron"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 42.3.1, < 42.3.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Electron: Buffer performs incorrect byte length calculations resulting in heap buffer under/overflow
